voices.name: Scott Bessent
voices.quote: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.

voices.name: David Solomon
voices.quote: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.

news.title: Marvell’s stock is on a run not seen in a quarter-century as the tech company grows in stature
news.summary: Marvell now ranks No. 22 in the S&P 500 with a $269 billion market capitalization that’s higher than those of PepsiCo and T-Mobile.

news.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang: AI Job Losses Are ‘Complete Nonsense,’ AI Driving Hiring Surge Instead

SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
news.summary: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh- biggest in the U.S. and above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

news.title: These two founders left Goldman and Meta to build voice AI for markets everyone else overlooked
news.summary: The startup's own stack for Africa and Middle East is now handling more than 17,000 calls per day.

news.title: Publishers will be able to opt out of AI Search, thanks to new regulation
news.summary: U.K. regulators are requiring Google offer a tool allowing website publishers to opt-out of generative AI search features. The option will be tested in the UK then rolled out globally.

news.title: The Iran war hasn’t slowed the economy, but higher inflation leads companies to freeze hiring
news.summary: The largest part of the economy grew faster in May, even as businesses were coping with the worst inflation in several years — at a cost to job seekers. Many companies have adopted temporary hiring freezes to offset their own rising costs.

news.title: Macy's earnings defy consumer concerns as CEO says 'not all customers are equal'

Binance to end NFT support on exchange, shift service to wallet
news.summary: Binance exchange said it will move NFT support from its exchange to its non-custodial wallet and offered users 30 days to migrate their NFTs.

news.title: Leveraged ETF assets double in two months as investors press AI bet
news.summary: Investors turn to ETFs linked to AI and Tech, with exposures in the U.S. and Korea/Taiwan doubling in just two months

news.title: Kraken parent Payward brings tokenized IPO access to retail investors
news.summary: Kraken and xStocks Alliance will let eligible users seek allocations in US IPOs at the offering price through tokenized shares in coming weeks.

news.title: The hottest stock market in the world has doubled this year. And Goldman Sachs sees another 40% gain from here.
news.summary: Earnings are the principal driver behind the breathtaking rallies achieved by Korean and Taiwanese benchmark indices in 2026, and Goldman Sachs thinks the market is still underestimating the longevity of the chip cycle.

news.title: Fed Chair Warsh makes first hires at central bank, including 'Project 2025' author
news.summary: The new Fed chair has made his first hires. One wrote the Fed chapter in the conservative policy blueprint "Project 2025."

news.summary: A major data report will give investors a glimpse into how the U.S. economy is doing amid the U.S.-Iran war and persistent inflation worries.

news.title: Private payrolls grew by 122,000 in May, stronger than expected, ADP reports
news.summary: Unlike prior months, where job growth was concentrated in healthcare and a few other sectors, gains were more broad-based.

news.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks Amid Trump-Iran Jitters; Finance Stock Slammed (Live Coverage)

news.title: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions: CertiK
news.summary: Russian ruble-backed stablecoin A7A5 processed over $110 billion in transactions despite Western sanctions, according to CertiK.

news.title: Meta is trying to sell AI agents to businesses in latest effort to diversify away from ads

news.summary: Bitcoin hasn't had this cold a winter in seven years.

news.title: UK regulator warns Premier League clubs over unauthorized crypto sponsors
news.summary: The FCA has urged clubs to rethink deals with unauthorized crypto and trading sponsors, warning that fans risk losing all their money and teams face legal and reputational fallout.

news.summary: Morgan Stanley's move is one of the earliest instances of a major Wall Street bank opening its platforms to external AI tools.

news.summary: Space-based internet has its sights on traditional broadband providers

news.title: Macy's posts strongest Q1 growth in four years, raises guidance despite consumer worries
news.summary: Macy's has been in the midst of a turnaround under CEO Tony Spring, who has worked to close underperforming stores and reinvest in ones worth keeping open.

news.title: US Treasury issues sanctions on Iran, targets 4 crypto exchanges
news.summary: The sanctions come four days after Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US had seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iranian crypto exchanges and wallets since late February.

news.title: Bitcoin's 'fear gauge' surges nearly 20%, its biggest jump since Feb. 5 crash
Modern robots impress, but are years away from replacing humans
news.summary: AI robotics company Figure posted several videos on X throughout May showcasing its robots performing basic tasks, including cleaning a room and sorting packages.

news.title: Crypto turns ‘contrarian bet’ as AI stocks draw investor attention: Bitwise
news.summary: “Investors still believe in crypto, but now that it’s a contrarian bet, they favor fundamentals over vibes,” says Bitwise investment chief Matt Hougan.

news.title: Goldman Sachs cuts Hong Kong stocks in favor of mainland China AI hardware plays
news.summary: The investment bank on Wednesday cut its rating on H shares to market-weight from overweight, while staying overweight mainland China's A shares.

news.title: UK Lords warn BoE could regulate pound stablecoins into irrelevance
news.summary: A UK House of Lords committee warned that strict stablecoin rules could make pound sterling tokens commercially unworkable despite supporting regulation.

news.title: US lawmakers push back on Labor Department plans to include crypto in 401(k)s
news.summary: The three members of Congress said the volatility of digital assets and “lack of regulation and safeguards” could put Americans’ retirement savings at risk.

news.title: Cyera eyes $12B valuation at 80x ARR multiple despite operating losses
news.summary: The cybersecurity company is nearing a $300 million round led by Evolution Equity Partners.

news.title: SEC makes digital assets strategic priority through 2030
news.summary: The regulator’s five-year roadmap calls for clearer crypto rules, support for tokenization and a framework for staking and onchain markets.

news.title: Palo Alto Networks tops earnings as AI fuels cybersecurity urgency
news.summary: The beat comes on lowered expectations, after the company gave disappointing guidance in February that fell short of analyst estimates.

news.title: Crypto correction vaporized $176B in investor funds: Are bears back in control?
news.summary: Bitcoin and altcoin prices crumbled as BTC lost the $70,000 level. Will investors’ pivot to AI stocks continue to weigh on crypto markets?

news.title: Crypto PACs pour $3M into Maryland races as California voters head to polls
news.summary: An affiliate of a political action committee backed by crypto companies ramped up spending on ads in California ahead of Tuesday’s primaries, but still has millions of dollars at stake in Maryland later this month.

news.title: Coinbase invests in ProShares ETF tailored for stablecoin reserve assets
news.summary: The exchange has invested an undisclosed amount in ProShares’ Treasury-focused ETF built for the post-GENIUS era as lawmakers debate whether stablecoin issuers can offer yield-bearing products.

news.title: Bitcoin’s $224K ‘fair value’ may emerge if sovereign debt fears deepen: Bitwise
news.summary: A sovereign default-risk model estimates Bitcoin’s fair value at $224,000, as rising debt risks and bond-market stress could strengthen the asset’s long-term investment case.

news.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in 4 months
news.summary: Uber's cutback has occurred after the company had reportedly encouraged staff to use AI as much as possible.

news.title: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon says markets are in 'greed' mode as AI companies seek billions
news.summary: Goldman Sachs CEO David Solomon's comments come as investors prepare for what will be one of the busiest periods for equity issuance in years.

news.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
news.summary: Microsoft on Tuesday took the wraps off Adaptive Spec-driven Scoring for Evaluation and Regression Testing, an open source framework for spinning up AI evaluations.

news.title: Martin Scorsese becomes the latest — and most unlikely — Hollywood voice for AI
news.summary: The caveat is that one of the world's most famous living directors is using the tech solely for storyboarding.

news.title: Microsoft launches Scout, an OpenClaw-inspired personal assistant
news.summary: Launched at Build, Microsoft Scout is a new AI assistant meant to bring the power and flexibility of OpenClaw into the Microsoft 365 system.

news.title: Google rolls out fake call detection to protect against AI deepfake impersonation scams
news.summary: As people increasingly refuse to answer calls from unknown numbers, scammers are shifting their tactics by spoofing trusted phone numbers and using AI deepfake technology to sound like authority figures, family members, or employers.

news.title: Microsoft offers devs a better way to control AI agent behavior
news.summary: The specification lets developer, compliance, and security teams define their own policies for agents to follow in portable policy files.
